design_philosophy: Emotional, viral, shareable. Playful but premium. We use a Neo-Brutalist visual language—soft, warm pastel backgrounds contrasted with hard 2px black borders and solid black drop shadows. This prevents the 'childish' feel of pastels and adds a creator-economy, edgy vibe.

spacing_and_layout.card: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#0A0A0A]

components.button_primary: bg-[#FFE66D] text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold text-lg shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#A0E8AF] transition-all hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A] active:translate-y-[4px] active:shadow-none
components.button_secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-bold shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#C8B6FF] transition-all
components.input: w-full bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base font-medium placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#C8B6FF] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]
components.slider_container: relative w-full h-4 bg-[#FDFBF7] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-full overflow-hidden shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A]
components.slider_thumb: absolute top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-8 h-8 bg-[#FFE66D] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-full shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A] cursor-pointer
components.chat_bubble_user: bg-[#C8B6FF] text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-none px-5 py-3 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] max-w-[80%]
components.chat_bubble_ai: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-none px-5 py-3 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] max-w-[80%]
components.marquee: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#FFE66D] py-3 font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-widest flex overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap

hero_image.description: Abstract floating shape used as a background accent behind the main hero text.

avatar_1.description: 3D Avatar character for the AI clone example in the hero or dashboard.

avatar_2.description: Alternate 3D Avatar for the public clone chat page.

lifestyle_shot.description: Image of a user smiling while texting, used in the social proof / 'how it works' section of the landing page.

accessibility.contrast: Black text (#0A0A0A) on pastel backgrounds adheres to APCA contrast standards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing and public pages to achieve the exact layout and Neo-Brutalist borders. Use Shadcn for complex forms in the setup wizard, but heavily override styles to include 'border-2 border-black' and 'shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]'.
For Typography, import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.html, or use 'Cabinet Grotesk' via Fontshare API if you prefer.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Open Sans', 'Lato', or 'Syne' for Headings. Headings must be punchy and tight.

Implement the Marquee (The 'Kinetic Texture'): On the public clone page, use `react-fast-marquee` to display a continuous black banner with yellow text: '⚠️ THIS IS AN AI CLONE • NOT THE REAL PERSON ⚠️'.
For the Clone Setup Wizard, design it as a step-by-step fluid UI. The Personality Sliders should be customized standard ranges that visually look like tactile, chunky switches.
Dashboard Layout: Use Mode A (The Tetris Grid). Mix sizes like 'col-span-full md:col-span-2 row-span-2' for primary analytics, and 'col-span-1' for individual memory blocks.

Ensure the hero section on the landing page does NOT use a 50% dark overlay. Keep the background clean and light, and use the 3D abstract shape/avatar images dynamically placed or floating around the bold text.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='create-clone-cta').
Icons: Use '@phosphor-icons/react' in duotone weight to match the playful premium vibe.
